name: HttpPackageConfiguration
description: The HTTP package configuration properties for the requested VOD source.

allOf.description: The relative path to the URL for this VOD source. This is combined with SourceLocation::HttpConfiguration::BaseUrl to form a valid URL.
The name of the source group. This has to match one of the Channel::Outputs::SourceGroup.
The streaming protocol for this package configuration. Supported values are HLS and DASH.
